# Level 03 — Sewers 1 — maze planes

Two 22x22 planes at `$F4EA` (walls) and `$F6CE` (features), addressed by
`maze_cell_addr` as `$F4EA + (row+1)*22 + col` (row 0 = top border). Wall-nibble
bit meaning is @wip (unresolved in level 1/2 too); shown raw. The FEATURE plane's
non-zero high-nibble cells are the special locations fired by
`dispatch_special_location` (cell_offsets $20/$40/$60/$80/$90/$A0/$C0/$D0/$E0/$F0
in special_dispatch_table).
